name: prd-development

frontmatter.name: prd-development
frontmatter.description: Guide product managers through structured PRD (Product Requirements Document) creation, orchestrating problem framing, user research synthesis, solution definition, and success criteria. Use when: (1) writing a complete PRD from scratch, (2) structuring product requirements for engineering handoff, (3) documenting a major new feature before development begins, (4) turning discovery findings into actionable requirements. Triggers on: 'write a PRD', 'create PRD', 'product requirements document', 'I need a PRD', 'document requirements', 'feature spec'.
